meaning: n.一种可食用的欧洲比目鱼
examples: It's a dark night for Brill.
Miss Brill had wanted to shake her.
Brill and Katya spend all day watching films.
And the author of the New York Times' obituary of Brill is also unrepentant.
As Brill points out, the chargemaster prices do not reflect the real cost of services.
